message:
fix(test): use exactly-representable float in JSON round-trip test

Replace 3.14 with 3.125 (exact in IEEE 754 binary64) to avoid
precision-dependent assertion flakiness in Series JSON serialization
round-trip test. 3.125 = 25/8 has an exact binary representation,
eliminating non-determinism from float-to-string conversion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
